title: Copper Item Pipes
body:
## Copper Item Pipes Mod

### Overview
Copper Item Pipes adds functionality to **all variants of copper grates**, turning them into a simple item transport system. The pipes can be **oxidized, waxed, or any state of copper** without affecting functionality.

### Crafting
- **Recipe**: Vanilla's 4 Copper Blocks in a star (No changes here).
- All copper block variants (including waxed and oxidized) are accepted.

![Awaiting content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QItx9xE2/images/183d939f5e3097bbb81484d96364a56106cd3401.png)

### How It Works
1. **Item Input**  
   - **Only hoppers** can insert items into the copper grates/pipes.
   - Droppers and dispensers **cannot** push items into these pipes.
2. **Item Throughput**  
   - Transfers **full stacks** at a time (unlike hoppers, which transfer one item at a time).
3. **Visual Transfer**  
   - Items are **visibly moved** through the grates.
   - If you break a grate with an item inside, that item will **drop**.
4. **Splitting Paths**  
   - If the pipe branches in multiple directions, the system picks **one** available path and **ignores** the rest. This means you can have backup branch paths.
   - When items are transported, they will try to store into touching containers unless the grate is waterlogged.
   - If no container has space, the items remain in the grate until space is available.
5. **Item Extraction**  
   - Place a **hopper underneath** a copper grate to pull items out of it.
6. **Waterlogged Grates**  
   - Pipes also work while **waterlogged**. However items in waterlogged pipes will prioitize transport over depositing.

### Use Cases
- Build compact item transport systems.
- Control item depositing with waterlogged pipes.
- No need to worry about copper oxidation states.

Enjoy the **Copper Item Pipes Mod** for streamlined item transport in your Minecraft world!

![Awaiting content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QItx9xE2/images/d577741921cf384496dace2dc54d903c79c70771.jpeg)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
